<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="mypy-per-code-baseline-phase-0">
<h1>mypy per-code baseline (Phase 0)</h1>
<p>This document records every per-code <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">#</span> <span class="pre">type:</span> <span class="pre">ignore[...]</span></code> baseline added in
Phase 0 of the booktx refactor (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx_refactor_review_recreated.md</span></code>).</p>
<p>Policy (user-approved, Q2=a): fix mypy errors that flag real defects; baseline
the remainder per-code with a targeted <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">#</span> <span class="pre">type:</span> <span class="pre">ignore[code]</span></code> and a short
justification. <strong>Global mypy strict config is unchanged.</strong> The goal of this
file is to make each remaining ignore auditable and removable once the
underlying annotation/env gap is closed.</p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">python</span> <span class="pre">-m</span> <span class="pre">mypy</span> <span class="pre">booktx</span></code> exits 0 against this baseline.</p>
<section id="real-defect-fixes-no-ignore-needed">
<h2>Real-defect fixes (no ignore needed)</h2>
<p>These were genuine type/logic bugs, fixed in Phase 0:</p>
<p>| Location                                                    | Was                                                                                              | Fix                                                              |
| ———————————————————– | ———————————————————————————————— | —————————————————————- | ————————————————————————– |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/command_hints.py</span></code>                                   | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">GLOSSARY_WORKFLOW_RULES:</span> <span class="pre">list[str]</span></code> holding <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tuple[int,</span> <span class="pre">str]</span></code> items                             | Annotated <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">list[tuple[int,</span> <span class="pre">str]]</span></code>                                |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_output_policy.py</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_scan_one</span></code>                  | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">seen:</span> <span class="pre">set[str]</span></code> with <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">(name,</span> <span class="pre">declaration)</span></code> tuple keys → dedup never matched                     | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">set[tuple[str,</span> <span class="pre">str]]</span></code>                                           |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/editor_indexes.py</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_write_jsonl_index</span></code>             | Iterated a <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">dict</span></code> (yields keys) → JSONL alias files were empty                                   | Accept <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">list</span>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <span class="pre">|</span> <span class="pre">Mapping</span></code>, iterate <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.values()</span></code>                                              |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/cli.py</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation_search_cmd</span></code>                    | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">effective_target_candidate(...).target</span></code> dereferenced a possibly-<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">None</span></code> candidate twice          | Extracted <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_neighbor_target</span></code> helper binding the local            |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/cli.py</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation_search_cmd</span></code>                    | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">source_view.chapter_id</span></code> — <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">SourceRecordView</span></code> has no such field                                  | Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">bundle.index.record_to_chapter.get(...)</span></code>                    |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_toc_audit.py</span></code>                                  | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">sorted(set[int</span>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <span class="pre">|</span> <span class="pre">None])</span></code> after a separate filter comprehension mypy cannot narrow | Single comprehension with inline <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">if</span> <span class="pre">o</span> <span class="pre">is</span> <span class="pre">not</span> <span class="pre">None</span></code> (heading/nav ordinals) |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/cli.py</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_configure</span></code>                          | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">write_profile_config</span></code> 3-arg call (signature takes 2)                                            | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">write_profile_config(proj.root,</span> <span class="pre">cfg)</span></code>                           |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/cli.py</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_revise_record</span></code>                      | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate_record_pair</span></code> imported from wrong module (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">translation_store</span></code>)                          | Removed; uses module-level import from <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx.validate</span></code>         |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/review_todo.py</span></code>                                     | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">quality_cfg.passes_by_number</span></code> (nonexistent attr); store never loaded (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">bundle.project</span></code> missing) | Real <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">passes</span></code> lookup + thread <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Project</span></code> through selection        |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/cli.py</span></code> epub cmds                                   | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">proj.paths.output_dir</span></code> (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">Project</span></code> has no <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">.paths</span></code>)                                              | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">proj.output_dir</span></code>                                                |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/build.py</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_io.py</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/html_io.py</span></code> | Stale <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">#</span> <span class="pre">type:</span> <span class="pre">ignore</span></code> comments (underlying types now available)                                 | Removed                                                          |</p>
</section>
<section id="per-code-baselines">
<h2>Per-code baselines</h2>
<p>Each entry below is a deliberate, justified per-code ignore. They should be
removed when the listed follow-up is done.</p>
<p>| Location                                                         | Code               | Reason / follow-up                                                                                                                            |
| —————————————————————- | —————— | ——————————————————————————————————————————————— | ———————————- |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/config.py:70</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">import</span> <span class="pre">tomli</span> <span class="pre">as</span> <span class="pre">tomllib</span></code>                  | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">import-not-found</span></code> | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tomli</span></code> ships no type stubs; used only as the Python 3.10 fallback for stdlib <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">tomllib</span></code>. Remove once minimum Python is 3.11+.                 |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/html_io.py:25</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">from</span> <span class="pre">bs4</span> <span class="pre">import</span> <span class="pre">...</span> <span class="pre">NavigableString</span> <span class="pre">...</span></code> | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">attr-defined</span></code>     | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">bs4</span></code> stubs do not re-export <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">NavigableString</span></code> explicitly. Remove when bs4 stubs improve.                                                     |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/build.py:384</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_policy_report_dict</span></code>                      | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | Internal build-report serializer; params span text2epub/booktx boundary objects. Add precise param types when the build module is decomposed. |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_output_policy.py:406</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">to_text2epub_output_rewrite</span></code> | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | Return type is a lazily-imported <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text2epub.OutputRewriteOptions</span></code>. Annotate when text2epub types are imported at module level.                |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_toc_audit.py:374</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_load_template</span></code>                  | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">EpubTemplateData</span>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <span class="pre">|</span> <span class="pre">None</span></code> from a lazy manifest loader. |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_toc_audit.py:387</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_collect_toc_entries</span></code>            | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | Returns <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">list[EpubTocEntry]</span></code>.                                                                                                                 |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/epub_toc_audit.py:466</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">audit_epub_chapter_map</span></code>          | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">chapter_map:</span> <span class="pre">ChapterMap</span>&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160;&#160; <span class="pre">|</span> <span class="pre">None</span></code> (lazy import).               |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/review_todo.py:628</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">resume_review_todo</span></code>                 | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | Returns a review task/workflow object; annotate return type in Phase 2 (review-todo repair).                                                  |
| <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">booktx/validate.py:1608</span></code> <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">_soft_hyphen_findings</span></code>                | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code>   | <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">effective</span></code> is an <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">EffectiveTranslatedChunks</span></code> bundle; annotate in Phase 4 (effective-translation extraction).                                 |</p>
</section>
<section id="remaining-no-untyped-def-strategy">
<h2>Remaining <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code> strategy</h2>
<p>The <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">no-untyped-def</span></code> ignores above are intentionally concentrated in modules
scheduled for deeper refactoring in later phases (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate.py</span></code> → Phase 4,
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">review_todo.py</span></code> → Phase 2). They will be replaced with precise annotations as
those modules are decomposed and their internal types are extracted into
public names, rather than bolted on now against unstable internals.</p>
</section>
</section>
</div>
